Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Class TemplateData

java.lang.Object
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.TemplateData
public class TemplateData extends Object
Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library. This file is copied/adapted from a Java implementation of the $1 Gesture Recognizer. It is used in this project to recognize player-drawn shapes. invalid input: '<'Original source: https://github.com/olwal/dollar
